name: GNews
description: Search engine for news articles aggregated from 60,000+ sources globally. Stronger international + non-English coverage than NewsAPI (especially solid for European + Asian sources). Returns title, description, content (truncated), url, image, source, and publishedAt per article. Free tier: 100 requests/day, max 10 articles per request. Sign up at https://gnews.io/register.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text article search. q supports AND / OR / NOT / quoted phrases. Use for broad news pulls including non-English coverage. Example: q='Fed cut rate', lang='en' returns US Fed coverage; lang='de' for German press takes.

lang.description: ISO 639-1 lang code — en, fr, de, es, it, pt, ja, zh, etc. Default: en.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code — us, gb, fr, de, jp.

max.description: Articles to return (1-100, free tier max 10).

in.description: Comma-separated fields to match q against: title, description, content. Default: title,description.

nullable.description: Comma-separated fields that can be null — image, description, content.

tools.name: top_headlines
tools.description: Top news headlines by country + category. Returns the current top stories. Use for daily macro sentiment scans.
